name: GE Vernova / GE Vernova
sector: Power generation and grid equipment / 发电与电网设备
summary: GE Vernova 覆盖发电、电网和电气化设备，代表 AI 数据中心用电增长背后的发电与电网扩容层。 / GE Vernova spans power generation, grid, and electrification equipment, representing the generation and grid-expansion layer behind AI data-center electricity growth.
summaryZh: GE Vernova 覆盖发电、电网和电气化设备，代表 AI 数据中心用电增长背后的发电与电网扩容层。
summaryEn: GE Vernova spans power generation, grid, and electrification equipment, representing the generation and grid-expansion layer behind AI data-center electricity growth.

business.description: 公司提供燃气发电、风电、电网、电气化和相关服务，处于电力系统扩容与可靠性建设环节。 / The company provides gas power, wind, grid, electrification, and related services, sitting in power-system expansion and reliability buildout.
business.descriptionZh: 公司提供燃气发电、风电、电网、电气化和相关服务，处于电力系统扩容与可靠性建设环节。
business.descriptionEn: The company provides gas power, wind, grid, electrification, and related services, sitting in power-system expansion and reliability buildout.
revenueModel: 发电设备与服务 / power equipment and services
风电与电气化 / wind and electrification

segments.name: Total revenue
segments.note: 批量自动稿仅使用可核对的总收入；分部收入拆分需要后续人工读取年报表格。

business.thesis: AI 负荷增长会提高电网接入、发电容量和电气设备需求，GE Vernova 适合作为电力基础设施层观察对象。 / AI load growth increases demand for grid connection, generation capacity, and electrification equipment, making GE Vernova a power-infrastructure layer to watch.
business.thesisZh: AI 负荷增长会提高电网接入、发电容量和电气设备需求，GE Vernova 适合作为电力基础设施层观察对象。
business.thesisEn: AI load growth increases demand for grid connection, generation capacity, and electrification equipment, making GE Vernova a power-infrastructure layer to watch.
riskNotes: 项目交付、燃机周期和电网投资审批会影响收入节奏。 / Project delivery, gas-turbine cycles, and grid-investment approvals affect revenue timing.
可再生能源业务盈利能力和大项目风险仍需跟踪。 / Renewables profitability and large-project risk need monitoring.

scarceLayers.whyScarce: AI 数据中心扩张需要可用电力、变压器、配电设备和工程交付，扩容周期往往长于服务器采购。
scarceLayers.whyScarceZh: AI 数据中心扩张需要可用电力、变压器、配电设备和工程交付，扩容周期往往长于服务器采购。
scarceLayers.whyScarceEn: AI data-center expansion requires available power, transformers, distribution equipment, and engineering delivery, often on longer cycles than server procurement.

themeExposure.rationale: AI 负荷增长会拉动发电容量、电网设备和电气化投资，GE Vernova 位于更上游的电力系统扩容层。
themeExposure.rationaleZh: AI 负荷增长会拉动发电容量、电网设备和电气化投资，GE Vernova 位于更上游的电力系统扩容层。
themeExposure.rationaleEn: AI load growth drives generation capacity, grid equipment, and electrification investment, placing GE Vernova in an upstream power-system expansion layer.
